title: Standardize AnnounceMessage channel field name for CCP-9 consistency
description: Epic to choose and apply consistent name (rx_channel or current_channel) across Python AnnounceMessage, Rust announce.rs, C announce.h/c, spec/05-routing.md, spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md, all tests, vectors, and comments. Must match wire format byte 3 and signed_data position. Chosen name: rx_channel per spec terminology. Break into per-language tasks. Related to project-LICHEN-3i18 and CCP-9.
